name: SuperHero Has A Secret
description:
"What say you surrender now, and I’ll keep you company on the way to your holding cell? Sound good?"

Zenith

____

You’ve battled Zenith countless times, and it usually ends with you bound for jail while she hovers triumphantly overhead. Don't let it bruise your ego, she's the Top Hero for a reason. And as your luck would have it, tonight you've run into her again. Following some intel you think you've uncovered an outpost of the Hero League, but before you can even open the door, Zenith's waiting right there.

But today she doesn't seem to be in any hurry...

____

Only one bot this week! I've been making two bots a week since June and don't want to burn out so I probably won't be making many bots this month.

Hope you all have happy holidays in case I don't see you until the new year!

____

Can't believe I hit 4k followers. I kinda feel like reminiscing about this year...

I used to make bots on a different site, but when I found JanitorAI I never looked back. Love this place.

I remember coming up with the idea for Ari, my catgirl bot and deciding to put a little more effort than normal into it. When it blew up I thought I had cracked the code and all my bots were gonna make it to trending.... Then my next 10 bots all did nowhere near as well. So around when I made Shay, the femcel I started experimenting a bit more and slowly started building a style and a routine to make bots more effectively. I always felt like Ari doing so well was mostly just luck, so when Selena, the goth girl hit a million I was over the moon. "Now I've actually figured it out" I thought... and then my next few bots didn't do nearly as well again :P

At this point I figure my success has been at least half luck.

Celeste, the mute roommate is definitely my favourite bot that I've made and the fact that it did so well really warms my heart.

Love you folks, especially the ones that keep coming back :)

👍 (°w°)d maurice ❤️ 🍞
creator: MaximillionPower
